chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.D-731 of 2023 ____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with Signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For order on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 17.09.2025 Syed Samiullah Shah, advocate for Pakistan Railway Mr. Muhammad Rafiq Rajori, AAG --------- This is an old petition of 2023. It was last taken up over two years ago. In the last two years, learned counsel for the petitioners has failed to diligently pursue this petition. Today, despite the lapse of two years, none present for the petitioners without any intimation. It appears that the petitioners have lost interest in pursuing this old petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non- prosecution. Head of Const. Benches JUDGE Nadir*
